sections.heading: Policy gate
sections.text: The policy gate reads the permission-filtered bundle and deterministic rule result before any proposed action can commit.

sections.heading: Permission boundary
sections.text: Denied sources stay in the permission boundary and cannot be quoted, summarized, or used as hidden evidence.

sections.heading: Grounded retrieval
sections.text: Docs RAG answers from permitted documentation, returns section-level citations, and names missing coverage instead of filling gaps.

sections.heading: Restricted-source behavior
sections.text: Locked citations can identify revealable metadata, but they never expose snippets or raw source text.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.text: The decision brief is a typed work product that carries grounded facts, gate state, missing evidence, conflicts, and next steps.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.text: Duplicate headings use the shared slug collision policy so deep links remain stable across rendering and extraction.
